commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=62ecf5dd188b7d95532fdcdcb4275e7260e057fb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR centralizes inbound supplemental quote/forward/thread/group context projection through core finalization, exports new channel-inbound SDK helpers/types, migrates rich channel plugins, updates tests, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +206, Tests +140, Docs +1. Total +347 across 23 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source path, but not with a live channel run: a visible Signal quote can produce `visibleQuoteSender` while `visibleQuoteText` is empty, and the branch only builds `SupplementalContext` when `entry.replyToBody` is truthy.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR has the protected maintainer label, mock-only real behavior proof, public SDK compatibility risk, and two focused review findings.

target.title: refactor: centralize inbound supplemental context
target.body:
## Summary

Centralizes inbound supplemental context projection so rich channel plugins pass canonical quote/forward/thread/group facts into core instead of hand-writing legacy `MsgContext` fields at each call site.

What changed:

- `finalizeInboundContext` now accepts `MsgContext.SupplementalContext` and projects it into the legacy `ReplyTo*`, `Forwarded*`, `Thread*`, `GroupSystemPrompt`, and structured untrusted-context fields before normalizing prompt-facing context.
- `buildChannelInboundEventContext` now carries canonical `SupplementalContext` through to the finalizer instead of expanding those fields itself.
- Added `resolveChannelInboundSupplementalContext` for shared quote visibility, self-quote body/media suppression, and lazy quote-media merging.
- Added `filterChannelInboundQuoteContext` for quote-only checks so plugins do not need to construct partial supplemental payloads just to ask the visibility question.
- Migrated Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, Matrix, MS Teams, Feishu, and QQBot touched paths to the shared helpers/finalizer projection while keeping platform parsing and fetches local.
- Preserved explicit legacy fields when a plugin sets them; supplemental projection only fills missing values.
- Fixed the Matrix thread edge from review by omitting supplemental quote ids for thread-target turns so finalizer projection cannot backfill `ReplyToId` into thread-only context.
- Exported `SupplementalContextFacts` through the plugin SDK and documented `MsgContext.SupplementalContext` as the canonical new channel path.
- Deprecated `filterChannelTurnSupplementalContext` in favor of `filterChannelInboundSupplementalContext`, or `filterChannelInboundQuoteContext` for quote-only checks.
- Added an `Unreleased` changelog entry for the plugin SDK helper/export/deprecation surface.

API/deprecation notes:

- Deprecated: `filterChannelTurnSupplementalContext` alias.
- Preferred: `filterChannelInboundSupplementalContext` for full supplemental filtering.
- Preferred: `filterChannelInboundQuoteContext` for quote-only checks.
- Preferred canonical payload: `SupplementalContextFacts` on `MsgContext.SupplementalContext`.
- Not deprecated: legacy `ReplyTo*`, `Forwarded*`, and `Thread*` fields. They remain runtime/template compatibility fields and are now projected by core.

Diff/LOC notes:

- Total branch diff: +582 / -235, net +347.
- Tests: +198 / -58, net +140.
- Changelog: +1.
- Production/runtime: +383 / -177, net +206.
- This is not raw LOC-negative, mostly because the central helper, public type docs, and regression coverage are new. It does remove repeated per-channel projection responsibility and narrows future channel changes to canonical supplemental facts.

## Verification

Latest exact-branch proof:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-context.test.ts src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/plugin-sdk-subpaths.test.ts --testNamePattern "SupplementalContext|channel-inbound|inbound context|finalizeInboundContext"`
  - passed: 2 files passed, 1 skipped, 15 tests passed
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-context.test.ts --testNamePattern "SupplementalContext|finalizeInboundContext"`
  - passed: 1 file, 2 tests passed
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo`
  - passed
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/templating.ts src/channels/turn/types.ts src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-context.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-inbound.ts`
  - passed
- `git diff --check`
  - passed
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --no-web-search --output /tmp/channel-context-autoreview-branch.txt --json-output /tmp/channel-context-autoreview-branch.json`
  - clean: no accepted/actionable findings; overall patch is correct

Earlier focused channel proof during this refactor:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/channels/inbound-event/context.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/inbound-context.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 26 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/msteams/src/monitor-handler/message-handler.authz.test.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.body-for-agent.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 25 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-context.test.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply/monitor/inbound-dispatch.test.ts`
  - passed: 2 files, 48 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/signal/src/monitor/event-handler.inbound-context.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor.gating.test.ts extensions/imessage/src/monitor/inbound-processing.systemPrompt.test.ts`
  - passed: 3 files, 48 tests
- `timeout 240s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-context.dm-topic-threadid.test.ts -t "builds Telegram payloads through the shared channel turn context"`
  - passed: 1 test
- `timeout 180s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/bot.test.ts --testNamePattern "includes replied image media|keeps reply linkage while omitting filtered binary reply captions|redacts forwarded origin inside reply targets"`
  - passed: 3 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-discord.config.ts --testNamePattern "does not inject the bot's previous message body|does not attach referenced reply media when reply context is hidden|processDiscordMessage"`
  - passed: 2 files, 77 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/feishu/src/bot.test.ts extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts --testNamePattern "quoted|quote|thread"`
  - passed: Feishu file, QQBot skipped by pattern, 14 tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/qqbot/src/engine/gateway/outbound-dispatch.test.ts`
  - passed: 1 file, 3 tests

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Inbound quote/forward/thread supplemental context is filtered and projected consistently in core while preserving Discord self-reply body/media suppression and existing channel routing metadata.

Real environment tested: Local source checkout with focused core, plugin SDK, and representative rich-channel Vitest suites plus extension test typecheck.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: See `Verification` above; latest branch-level commands were run after the final API/deprecation cleanup and commit.

Evidence after fix: Focused tests passed for core finalization, SDK exports, Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, iMessage, Matrix, MS Teams, Feishu, and QQBot surfaces; branch autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Observed result after fix: Channels now pass canonical `SupplementalContext` or shared helper results into core; `finalizeInboundContext` projects legacy fields once; Matrix thread turns do not get unintended `ReplyToId` backfill.

What was not tested: Full repository test suite, full CI, and live channel roundtrips were not run for this refactor PR.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
